15: - To illustrate the Goal Setting and Monitoring pattern, we have an
16: example using LangChain and OpenAI APIs:
17: Objective: Build an AI Agent which can write code for a specified
18: use case based on specified goals:
19: - Accepts a coding problem (use case) in code or can be as input.
20: - Accepts a list of goals (e.g., "simple", "tested", "handles edge
22: in code or can be input.
23: - Uses an LLM (like GPT-4o) to generate and refine Python code
24: until the goals are met. (I am using max 5 iterations, this could
25: be based on a set goal as well)
26: - To check if we have met our goals I am asking the LLM to judge
27: this and answer just True or False which makes it easier to stop
